description.en: Requests arbitrary data (such as images) from the clipboard, returning aPromisethat resolves with an array ofClipboardItemobjects containing the clipboard's contents.

excerpt.es: Requests arbitrary data (such as images) from the clipboard, returning aPromisethat resolves with an array ofClipboardItemobjects containing the clipboard's contents.
excerpt.en: Requests arbitrary data (such as images) from the clipboard, returning aPromisethat resolves with an array ofClipboardItemobjects containing the clipboard's contents.

description.en: Requests text from the system clipboard, returning aPromisethat is fulfilled with a string containing the clipboard's text once it's available.

excerpt.es: Requests text from the system clipboard, returning aPromisethat is fulfilled with a string containing the clipboard's text once it's available.
excerpt.en: Requests text from the system clipboard, returning aPromisethat is fulfilled with a string containing the clipboard's text once it's available.
